common.appDescription: A personal music portfolio that feels like a code editor.

codeEditor.emptyStateDescription: Select a file from the explorer to start viewing its content.
codeEditor.shortcutOpen: Click files in the explorer to open
codeEditor.shortcutSwitch: Click tabs to switch between open files

inspector.title: Inspector
inspector.linesSections: Lines: 64 • Sections: intro, verse, chorus, bridge

terminal.streamOk: OK  :: stream attached :: buffer stable :: cpu 3% :: latency 12ms
terminal.streamIdle: IDLE :: awaiting next track :: type `play` to resume transport

tagGrid.title: Tag Grid
tagGrid.empty: All tag songs are already in the queue

controls.openTrackWithHint: Open {title}. Double click to add to queue.

player.selectTrack: Select a track to start playing

shell.title: Admin Workspace
shell.subtitle: Modernized upload, tagging, and playlist control surface.

track.title: Track Info
track.description: Core track identity and timeline metadata.

classification.title: Classification
classification.description: Library semantics, availability, and tag grouping.

lyrics.title: Lyrics
lyrics.description: Fetch, normalize, and edit synchronized lyric content.

duration.label: Duration
duration.description: Seconds, used for lyric estimation and summaries.

tags.label: Tags
tags.description: Assign reusable tags for queueing and filtering.
tags.placeholder: Type tags, press Enter or comma
tags.emptyHint: Type a tag or choose one of the suggestions.

neteaseUrl.label: NetEase Music URL
neteaseUrl.description: Pull lyrics and metadata from a supported NetEase song link.

lrc.title: Timed lyrics detected
lrc.message: {count} lyric lines are ready for synchronized playback.

plain.title: Plain lyrics detected
plain.message: {count} lyric lines are loaded. Convert to LRC for sync.

fileCard.title: Audio Source
fileCard.description: Attach the binary that will be deployed to the library.
fileCard.dropActive: Drop to attach the audio source
fileCard.dropIdle: Drop file or click to browse

summary.title: Status Feed
summary.description: Current readiness, lyric state, and deploy notices.

readiness.title: Deploy Checklist
readiness.description: Required fields that must be ready before deploying.
readiness.deployReady: The draft passes the required deployment checks.
readiness.deployBlocked: Complete the missing items before deploying.

asset.title: Attached Asset
asset.description: Quick summary of the currently selected upload source.
asset.emptyDescription: Attach a file to preview size, duration, and readiness.

playlist.title: Playlist ({count} songs)
playlist.subtitle: Review, search, and stage edits before committing the library.
playlist.searchPlaceholder: Search title, artist, album, or tag

detail.assetDescription: Preview and inspect the currently selected track source.
detail.unsaved: You have unsaved draft changes for the selected track.
detail.synced: The selected draft matches the staged playlist.

emptyDetail.title: No track selected
emptyDetail.description: Choose a song from the playlist to inspect or edit its metadata.

emptyList.title: No matching songs
emptyList.description: Try another search term or add tracks from the upload workspace.

mobilePrompt.title: Open the detail editor
mobilePrompt.description: On smaller screens, the selected song opens in a focused drawer.

playlist.drawerDescription: Select a track to start editing.

confirm.discardDescription: Switching tracks will drop any unsaved draft changes for the current selection.
confirm.deleteDescription: The track will be removed from the staged playlist until you save or reload.

errors.workspaceCrashDescription: The admin workspace hit an unexpected client error. Reset the panel to recover.

draftUpdated.title: Draft updated
draftUpdated.message: Track changes are staged locally until you save the playlist.

trackRemoved.title: Track removed
trackRemoved.message: The song is removed from the staged playlist. Save to persist.

playlistSaving.title: Saving playlist
playlistSaving.message: Pushing the current staged library to the admin API.

playlistSaved.title: Playlist saved
playlistSaved.message: Saved {count} song entries to the library.

metadataExtracting.title: Extracting metadata
metadataExtracting.message: Reading embedded metadata from the selected audio file.

metadataReady.title: Metadata ready
metadataReady.message: No embedded title metadata was found, but the file is ready.

lyricsSynced.title: Lyrics synced
lyricsSynced.selectedMessage: Fetched {count} lines for the selected track.

lyricsNormalized.title: Lyrics normalized
lyricsNormalized.message: Removed extra spacing and normalized line content.
lyricsNormalized.selectedMessage: Updated the selected draft with normalized lyric content.

convertedToLrc.title: Converted to LRC
convertedToLrc.uploadMessage: Generated estimated timestamps from the draft duration.
convertedToLrc.selectedMessage: Generated estimated timestamps for the selected draft.

deploying.title: Deploying track
deploying.message: Uploading binary assets and writing the playlist entry.

deployComplete.title: Deploy complete
deployComplete.message: {title} is now available in the playlist.

recordingAttached.title: Recording attached
recordingAttached.message: {filename} is ready as the upload source.
